name: kntnt-wp-skills
description: Mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy, scaffold a brand-new one from nothing, or build one out on the Ollie block theme. Four user-invoked skills: `clone` creates a fresh local copy of a production site and `pull` refreshes an existing one incrementally, both over one transfer engine reached solely through the Novamira MCP — never over SSH; `mkwp` scaffolds a brand-new local site standalone, with no production involved; and `build-ollie-site` builds a coherent, token-correct site on Ollie, bottom-up by Atomic Design, from a design system and a set of mockups. Every skill puts every decision to you as a recommendation you accept or override.
